sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '3%' and (TTY = '100' or not GL like '%2') and not GL = '3584005'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1621502','2421502','2850500')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '1050000' and GL < '1090000'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = p.Descr, Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = '(2) Elim' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999'
update TransX set Flex3 = '(1) Co2Co' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Co' + Co + ' Tp' + TP from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = Descr, Flex4 = Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'GL Grp 4'
update TransX set Flex1 = Descr, Flex4 = Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'GL Grp 4'
update TransX set TPname = '', Flex3 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = Descr, TPname = Field2 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Contract = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'HUD_STM_Contracts' and Co <> '2008'

update TransX set Flex3 = Descr, TPname = ID from TransX inner join (select min(Descr) as Descr, min(ID) as ID, Field2 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'HUD_STM_Contracts' group by Field2) a on Contract = Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Co = '2008'
update TransX set Flex1 = '02 RCR & ALAE' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('02 RCR','04 ALAE')
update TransX set Flex1 = '26 Chg RCR & ALAE' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('26 Chg RCR','28 Chg ALAE')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 <> ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and  (Contract = '' or Contract like 'FV-%')

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Contract, PC, UWYR, Amt1, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
